title: Sverklo project configuration
description: Optional configuration for a sverklo project. All fields are optional — sverklo has zero-config defaults and this file is only needed if you want to override them.

ignore.description: Additional path patterns to exclude from indexing, in gitignore syntax. Merged on top of .gitignore and .sverkloignore.

include.description: Explicit include patterns. If set, only paths matching these are indexed. Rarely needed — prefer `ignore`.

languages.description: Limit indexing to a subset of languages. Defaults to all supported (ts, js, python, go, rust, java, c, cpp, ruby, php).

embeddings.description: Embedding model configuration. Defaults to the bundled all-MiniLM-L6-v2 ONNX model.

model.description: Model identifier. 'default' uses the bundled ONNX model.

dimensions.description: Embedding dimensions. Must match the chosen model.

bm25Weight.description: Weight applied to BM25 lexical scores in the hybrid fusion. Default 1.0.

vectorWeight.description: Weight applied to vector similarity scores in the hybrid fusion. Default 1.0.

pageRankBoost.description: Multiplier applied to PageRank importance when re-ranking search results. Default 1.0.

defaultTokenBudget.description: Default token budget for sverklo_search responses when the caller doesn't specify one.

maxFileSizeBytes.description: Skip files larger than this. Default 1 MB.

concurrency.description: Max concurrent embedding workers. Defaults to CPU count.

watch.description: Enable file watcher for incremental reindexing. Default true.

stalenessThresholdDays.description: Mark memories as stale if their git SHA is older than this many days and the surrounding code has changed. Default 30.

coreTierLimit.description: Max number of memories that can live in the 'core' tier (always-on project invariants). Default 25.

telemetry.description: Telemetry configuration. Off by default — must be explicitly enabled via `sverklo telemetry enable`.

endpoint.description: Override the telemetry endpoint. Default is https://t.sverklo.com. Point to your own CF worker for self-hosted telemetry.
